workflow-manager.description: Orchestrates the feature development workflow from request to delivery

pm-agent.description: Product Manager - evaluates features, writes requirements, coordinates with designer

em-agent.description: Engineering Manager - reviews requirements for feasibility

designer-agent.description: Designer - creates design concepts when requested by PM

dev-agent.description: Developer - implements features and fixes bugs

qa-agent.description: QA - tests features with Playwright, reports bugs
